title: Deepen the Discogs Import module
description: Encapsulate entire Discogs release import pipeline (caching, artist lookup/creation, cover downloading, insertion) into a single cohesive DAL function `import_album_from_discogs`.

title: Collapse the role-enforcement seam
description: Introduce `@require_role` decorator in `core/auth.py` and apply to routes, removing repeated inline role checks.

title: Move unified search SQL into the album DAL
description: Move the local database query in `search_unified_route` out of the route and into `search_albums_local` in `album_dal.py`.

title: Wishlist promote logic cleanup
description: Clean up wishlist promotion logic, removing duplicate imports and database check code.

title: Push user stats counts into the user DAL
description: Encapsulate COUNT query logic for user physical copies and albums inside a new DAL function `get_user_stats` in `user_dal.py`.

title: Extract a useVault composable
description: Extract `useVault` composable on the frontend to centralize state, loading, error, search, and filtering, removing duplications in views.

title: CORS wildcard and SQL f-string risks
description: Restrict CORS wildcards to specified origin list, and replace dynamic SQL update queries with static, parameterized ones.

title: Deepen Wishlist Promote logic and clean inline import
description: Wishlist promotion logic is currently placed in `wishlist_routes.py`. It should be encapsulated in a DAL function `promote_wishlist_item` in `wishlist_dal.py`. Additionally, the inline import of `get_album_artists` in `wishlist_dal.py` can be moved to the top of the file.

title: Migrate database from SQLite to Supabase PostgreSQL
description: Set up Supabase PostgreSQL for production, keeping SQLite for local development. Refer to the migration guide in .context/supabase-migration-guide.md for step-by-step instructions.

title: Encapsulate direct SQL count queries from route files into DAL
description: Create helper functions count_albums_by_cover_path in album_dal.py and count_artists_by_image_path in artist_dal.py, calling them from delete routes.

title: Replace redundant direct SQL select queries in routes
description: Sostituire le query esplicite SELECT al.*, us.username ... in discogs_routes.py con chiamate standard a find_album_by_id e find_artist_by_id del DAL.

title: Encapsulate Admin User Ban and Audit Logging into User DAL
description: Move the raw SQL SELECT, UPDATE, and INSERT queries from `toggle_user_ban` route in `admin_routes.py` into a transactional DAL function `toggle_user_ban_status` inside `user_dal.py`.

title: Centralize System & Technical Stats Retrieval in DAL
description: Centralize the raw SQL COUNT queries in `get_technical_stats` route in `admin_routes.py` into a unified `get_technical_stats` DAL function in `stats_dal.py` or a dedicated stats module.

title: Move Moderator Profile Wipes into User DAL
description: Move the user bio and avatar wipe SQL updates and audit log insertions from `admin_routes.py` into functions `admin_wipe_user_avatar` and `admin_wipe_user_bio` in `user_dal.py`.

title: Extract Moderation & Audit History queries from User Detail Route
description: Extract the raw SQL queries fetching report history and audit history inside `get_user` route in `user_routes.py` into a `get_user_moderation_history` function in the DAL layer.

title: Extract Cache Eviction and Album Deletions into DAL
description: Extract the SQL query for expired cache deletion from `refresh_cache` and manual album deletion from `delete_manual_entry` in `admin_routes.py` into functions `clear_expired_discogs_cache` and `delete_manual_album` in the DAL layer.
